<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Cholestagel co-administered with a 3-hydroxy-3-methyl-glutaryl-coenzyme-A (HMG-CoA)-reductase inhibitor (statin) is indicated as adjunctive therapy to diet to provide an additive reduction in...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>gout（93.4%）</li>
<li>congestive heart failure（89.8%）</li>
<li>acute pulmonary heart disease（88.6%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant familial hematuria-retinal arteriolar tortuosity-contractures syndrome（87.1%）</li>
<li>brain small vessel disease 1 with or without ocular anomalies（86.9%）</li>

<li>phosphorus metabolism disease（84.8%）</li>

<li>suppurative otitis media（83.2%）</li>
<li>dyspepsia（83.1%）</li>
<li>HIV infectious disease（79.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
